title: Iran Says It Seized Two Ships Near the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: A British naval agency said the two vessels had come under attack near the strait, as a U.S. blockade on Iran’s ports continued.
summary_public: A British naval agency said the two vessels had come under attack near the strait, as a U.S. blockade on Iran’s ports continued.
